children.text: You had 10 straight deliveries with 100% order accuracy.
Recently, you spent 10+ minutes near a dropoff before completing delivery in the app
Fuel up twice per month and unlock 20 cents off per gallon savings at Circle K.
30%+ of your leave-at-door deliveries lacked drop-off photos.
Multiple customers reported drinks or desserts missing from their orders.
Multiple customers reported receiving the wrong order. To help avoid this, confirm the name on the receipt matches the name in the app at pickup and drop-off.
